title: DataPackageKitDefinition - Metadata API
description: Represents the top-level data kit container definition. Content objects can be added after the data kit is defined.

dataKitType.description: The type of data kit created. Available in API version 63.0 and later. Valid values are: Default Sandbox

dataKitSource.description: The data source in the updated data kit. Available in API version 63.0 and later.

description.description: The description of the data kit.

developerName.description: The name of the application. This name contain only underscores and alphanumeric characters and must be unique in your org. It must begin with a letter, not include spaces, not end with an underscore, and not contain two consecutive underscores.

isDeployed.description: Indicates whether the data kit content is deployed.

isEnabled.description: Indicates whether the data kit is enabled.

masterLabel.description: Label that identifies the AI application throughout the Salesforce user interface.

useDeterministicNaming.description: Indicates whether the data kit should use the deterministic naming feature. Available in API version 65.0 and later. Valid values are: True False

dataSpaceDefinitionDevName.description: Data space name used to create the data kit. Available in API version 61.0 and later.

deploymentOrder.description: Deployment order of components that are added to the data kit. Available in API version 61.0 and later.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a DataPackageKitDefinition component.
